title: DR Fidelity Benchmark — distance-preservation focus
description: A reproducible benchmark characterizing how faithfully dimensionality-reduction (DR) methods — PCA, Isomap, t-SNE, UMAP, PyMDE, PCC, DREAMS, and toorPIA — preserve distance structure when mapping high-dimensional data to 2D, on synthetic datasets whose true geometry is known. Near and global distance bands are evaluated separately via band-restricted Shepard correlation (fixed absolute radius), with additional out-of-sample (addplot) and stability tests. Results report: https://toorpia.github.io/dr-fidelity-benchmark/
